summary: Iteration 9 final no-error verification PASSED. Backend: 8/8 pytest cases green — all 7 review-request scenarios behave as specified (POST /api/save returns 9-char AAAA-AAAA code; GET /api/save/{code} round-trips progress; GET /api/save/UNKNOWN returns clean 404 JSON; POST /api/checkout/session?skin=aurora returns real https://checkout.stripe.com cs_test_... URL + session_id; POST with unknown skin returns 400 JSON with detail; **GET /api/checkout/status/UNKNOWN_SID now returns 404 JSON {detail:'Checkout session not found'} — the iter8 regression is fixed via try/except in server.py:176-184**; GET /api/owned-skins/anyid returns {owned:[]}). Frontend Playwright pass at 390x844: tutorial overlay shows on first launch and does NOT come back after Skip+reload (AsyncStorage persistence verified). All home testIDs present (level-badge, xp-card, start-game-button, daily-button, skins-button, settings-button, calibrate-shortcut). All 7 skin cards (origami, skyblue, mint, crimson, aurora, phoenix, galaxy) render with BUY $2.99 chips on the 3 premium ones. Settings: sensitivity-slider, sound-toggle, recalibrate-button, backup-button (generated 'M9D8-CX8Y'), share-code, restore-code-input, restore-button, reset-highscore all visible & functional. Game /game flow: Ready overlay → ready-start-button → score-display + pause-button → resume-button works. Daily /game?daily=1 also reaches Ready overlay. **CRITICAL POSITIVE: ZERO console errors and ZERO pageerrors captured during the entire flow.** expo-audio is pinned to ~1.1.1 in package.json (matches Expo SDK 54 expected version — no SDK mismatch warning). The user's 'no errors' acceptance criterion is met.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:180-184 — the new try/except correctly wraps stripe_checkout.get_checkout_status and maps 'No such checkout.session' → 404 and other Stripe errors → 502; clean and idiomatic.

Minor doc-only nit: review request listed the home testIDs as 'lvl-badge', 'xp-bar', 'start-button', 'calibrate-button' but actual implementation uses 'level-badge', 'xp-card', 'start-game-button', 'calibrate-shortcut' (game.tsx uses 'calibrate-button' on the Ready overlay). Both naming sets are clear; just a heads-up so future regressions cite real testIDs.

PaperPlane.tsx uses React Fragment (<>...</>) inside <LinearGradient> at lines 62-65 and 78-81. Older react-native-svg builds emit a 'Invalid prop supplied to React.Fragment' DEV warning when SVG forwards extra props — that warning was visible in expo.out.log historically but did NOT fire during the iter9 Playwright run (0 console errors). Safe to leave; if you want it 100% silent in dev, replace each `<>` with an explicit `<G>` group or a JSX array.
audio.ts gracefully no-ops on web (try/catch swallows MP3 CDN block) — verified no audio-related crash during sound-toggle test.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (every required testID present, tutorial dismissal persists, save-code generated, game + daily Ready overlays load, 0 pageerrors, 0 console errors)

seed_data_creation: Cleared localStorage to retest first-launch tutorial; created two ephemeral save documents via POST /api/save (one round-trip-verified, one orphan in db.saves — no cleanup endpoint, harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 is the final clean pass. All 7 review-request endpoint scenarios verified via /app/backend/tests/test_iteration9.py (pytest 8/8). Frontend testID truth-source: home uses 'level-badge'/'xp-card'/'start-game-button'/'calibrate-shortcut'; settings uses 'recalibrate-button' and 'reset-highscore' (no '-button' suffix); skins uses 'skins-back' / 'skin-card-{id}' / 'buy-chip-{id}' where ids are origami|skyblue|mint|crimson|aurora|phoenix|galaxy (note: 'Skyliner' display name maps to id='skyblue'); game uses 'ready-start-button'/'calibrate-button'/'ready-back'/'score-display'/'pause-button'/'resume-button'/'quit-button'. Stripe key sk_test_emergent is real and live — every checkout/session POST creates a real cs_test_... session. The /api/checkout/status/{unknown} 404 fix is in server.py lines 176-184. expo-audio pinned at ~1.1.1 in package.json matches SDK 54.
rca_of_issue: N/A — iter8's only outstanding bug (GET /api/checkout/status/UNKNOWN_SID returning text/plain 500) is fixed in iter9: server.py wraps stripe_checkout.get_checkout_status() in try/except, maps 'No such checkout.session'/'not found' → HTTPException(404) and other upstream Stripe errors → HTTPException(502). Verified live: curl https://flying-game-demo-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api/checkout/status/cs_test_doesnotexist123 → HTTP 404 JSON {"detail":"Checkout session not found"}.
